series_metadata.series_title: Competitive Contracts - Request for Proposal & Invitation to Bid
series_metadata.series_description: Series includes all Competitive, Response, Evaluation, Clarification, Award, Protest, Change Order, Amendment and Performance Bond documents related to Request for Proposal and Invitation to Bid competitive procurements. These documents to procure information technology hardware, software and services are created by Enterprise Information Technology Contracting during the life of the procurement. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy.* For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy.* If the contract includes both goods and services, retain nine years after the termination of the contract then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved." ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy.* For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy.* If the contract includes both goods and services, retain nine years after the termination of the contract then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved.", Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
